title: Falconry Mews & Housing Standards Every Apprentice Must Know
description: What the falconry apprentice exam tests on mews design, perch types, weathering areas, and housing requirements under federal and state regulations.
excerpt: A mews is more than a shed with a bird in it. Falconry housing standards are federally regulated and heavily tested on the apprentice exam. Here's what you need to know.

title: Ohm's Law Made Simple for the Ham Radio Technician Exam
description: Learn Ohm's Law for the ham radio Technician exam: V=IR explained with examples, memory tricks, and the exact question types the FCC tests.
excerpt: Ohm's Law — V = IR — appears on every Technician license exam. Master the formula, the units, and the common exam scenarios in one focused read.

title: Symmetric vs. Asymmetric Encryption: A Security+ SY0-701 Primer
description: Symmetric vs. asymmetric encryption for CompTIA Security+ SY0-701: key differences, AES, RSA, ECC, TLS hybrid model, and exam-tested scenarios explained.
excerpt: Symmetric encryption uses one key; asymmetric uses two. That distinction drives dozens of Security+ SY0-701 exam questions on TLS, key exchange, digital signatures, and PKI.
